title: Adjustments that you show on the supplementary section of the tax return 2016
description: Instructions for completing adjustments in the supplementary tax return.

content_blocks.text: Did you receive a distribution during 2015-16 on which family trust distribution tax has been paid?

rows: Read question A4 Amount on which family trust distribution tax has been paid 2016 You may be entitled to an adjustment, or return to main menu Individual tax return instructions 2016 .

content_blocks.text: Did you make a payment to us more than 14 days before the due date for payment?

rows: Read question C1 Credit for interest on early payments 2016 . You may be able to claim credit for interest on early payments, or return to main menu Individual tax return instructions 2016 .
Go to M1 Medicare levy reduction or exemption 2016 .

content_text:
## Completing your tax return
Did you receive a distribution during 2015-16 on which family trust distribution tax has been paid?
Yes | Read question A4 Amount on which family trust distribution tax has been paid 2016 You may be entitled to an adjustment, or return to main menu Individual tax return instructions 2016 .
No | Read on.
Did you make a payment to us more than 14 days before the due date for payment?
Yes | Read question C1 Credit for interest on early payments 2016 . You may be able to claim credit for interest on early payments, or return to main menu Individual tax return instructions 2016 .
No | Go to M1 Medicare levy reduction or exemption 2016 .
